title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Alex Hormozi uses AI across his businesses via a four-pillar framework: data as a competitive moat, voice-first design, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. The video highlights a common operational mistake that required company-wide correction.
